name: teleton-code
description: Cloud IDE companion for Teleton Agent with a Teleton-powered code agent
author: Yukinaton

scripts.build: npm --prefix client-new run build && node scripts/sync-client-build.mjs
scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && node --check server/app.js && node --check server/application/agent/clarification-flow.js && node --check server/application/agent/session-prompt-service.js && node --check server/application/agent/structured-build-flow.js && node --check server/application/chat/attachment-service.js && node --check server/handlers/file-handler.js && node --check server/handlers/workspace-handler.js && node --check server/lib/config.js && node --check server/lib/state-store.js && node --check server/lib/code-agent-profile.js && node --check server/lib/code-agent-surface.js && node --check server/lib/code-agent-workspace.js && node --check server/lib/code-tool-registry.js && node --check server/lib/coding-tools.js && node --check server/lib/prompt-engine.js && node --check server/lib/runtime-adapter.js && node --check server/lib/workspace-utils.js && node --check scripts/sync-client-build.mjs && node --check cli/index.js && node --check bin/teleton-code.js
